308:kbs/docs/kbs_attestation_protocol.md:178:> **Note:** The `init-data` field is optional. The `tee-pubkey` can be either RSA or EC format (see [Key Format](#key-format) section). The `additional_evidence` is a JSON string representation of a mapping of TEE type to evidence pairs.
309:kbs/docs/kbs_attestation_protocol.md:213:format and can be either RSA or Elliptic Curve (EC) format, as described in the [key format](#key-format) section.
310:kbs/docs/kbs_attestation_protocol.md:330:This field follows the [JSON Web Key](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7517) format and supports both RSA and Elliptic Curve (EC) key types.
311:kbs/docs/kbs_attestation_protocol.md:332:#### RSA Key Format
312:kbs/docs/kbs_attestation_protocol.md:336:  "kty": "RSA",
313:kbs/docs/kbs_attestation_protocol.md:355:The `kty` field determines which format is used. For RSA keys, `n` and `e` represent the modulus and exponent respectively. For EC keys, `crv` specifies the curve name (e.g., "P-256", "P-384"), and `x` and `y` are the coordinates of the public key point.
314:kbs/docs/kbs_attestation_protocol.md:613:| `jwk` | Public key to verify token signature | RSA Json Web Key        |                      |
315:kbs/docs/kbs_attestation_protocol.md:622:RSA or Elliptic Curve (EC) format, as described in the [Key Format](#key-format) section.
